revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:榛名神社 (八王子市)]]
{{Multiple issues | Citations needed = October 2019 | Notability = October 2019 | Wikify = October 2019 | Non-encyclopedic = October 2019 }} {{Expand|Revisions focused on the shrine as the main subject and additions to the definition.|date=September 2021}}
{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | Name = Haruna Shrine (榛名神社) | image =File:Haruna jinjya.jpg | location = {{ill|Hachiōji|en|Hachiōji|qid=Q208863|lt=Hachiōji, Tokyo|1=Hachiōji}}, {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|qid=Q1490|lt=Tokyo|1=Tokyo}}, Terada-chō 838 | ISO = JP-13 | Latitude = 35 | Latitude_min = 37 | Latitude_sec = 42.4 | Longitude = 139 | Longitude_min = 18 | Longitude_sec = 24.0 | deity = {{ill|Haniyasu-hiko and Haniyasu-hime|lt=Haniyasu-hime|ja|埴山毘売命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haniyasu-hiko and Haniyasu-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | Sacred Object = | Shrine Rank = {{ill|Village shrine (Japan)|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|qid=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village shrine (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q712534}} | Established = | Chief Priest = | Main Hall = | Other Names = | Pilgrimage Route = | Annual Festival = First Sunday of April | Rituals = | Map = Japan Western Tokyo |thumb|left|caption=Front of Haruna Shrine. The torii gate is slightly elevated from the road. | location = {{ill|Hachioji|qid=Q208863|1=Hachiōji}} | coordinates = {{Coord|35.628444|N|139.306667|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} }} '''Haruna Shrine''' (榛名神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Hachiōji|en|Hachiōji|qid=Q208863|lt=Hachiōji, Tokyo|1=Hachiōji}}, {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|qid=Q1490|lt=Tokyo|1=Tokyo}}.
== Once-in-a-Decade Unveiling == [[File:御禮祭の式典.jpg|thumb|left|Once-in-a-decade unveiling ceremony]] On April 1, 2018 (Heisei 30), the shrine's unveiling festival (御禮祭) was held. The shrine's parishioners (氏子) from Terada received purification from the chief priest (神主) and conducted the event following traditional Shinto rites. [[File:榛名神社のご祭神との対面.jpg|thumb|left|A long line formed for the ceremony.]] The next unveiling will take place on April 1, 2028. The enshrined deity is {{ill|Haniyasu-hiko and Haniyasu-hime|lt=Haniyasu-hime|ja|ハニヤマヒメノミコト|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haniyasu-hiko and Haniyasu-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
The surrounding area includes a Keio Bus stop, a fire brigade building, a community center, and a post box.
{{Clear}}
